dropdown.title: Projects
dropdown.subtitle: Learn about the different initiatives and ministries we carry out to impact our community.

slides.title: The Word that transforms
slides.subtitle: Because the word of God is living and effective. The gospel of Christ is our mission, our passion and our life.

items.title: Prayer
items.description: The foundation of all we are; Prayer moves the heart of God and transforms ours every day.

items.title: Worship
items.description: We celebrate God with everything we are; Worship is not a moment, it is a daily lifestyle.

items.title: Discipleship
items.description: We grow together in faith; Each believer is trained and equipped to impact their family and environment.

items.title: Evangelism
items.description: We take the gospel beyond our walls, because every person deserves to hear the good news.

items.name: Juan and María Delgado
items.description: With over 20 years of ministry, Pastors Delgado have guided Maranatha with a vision of integrity and love. Her passion is to see lives transformed by God's grace and families strengthened in biblical truth.
